field_evidence.column_name: a single C18 bonded silica column (Nucleosil C18AB, 100 Å pore, 250 × 4.6 mm)
field_evidence.temperature_celsius: the column temperature was kept constant at 43 °C

conditions.critical_condition_basis: Chromatographic critical condition of linear PS
conditions.physical_address: Department of Chemistry and Center for Integrated Molecular Systems, Pohang University of Science and Technology, Pohang, 790-784, Korea; Institute for Chemical Process and Environmental Technology, National Research Council of Canada, Ottawa, Ontario K1A 0R9, Canada
conditions.corresponding_author_name: Hee Cheong Lee; Hyunjung Lee; Wonmok Lee; Taihyun Chang; Jacques Roovers
conditions.notes: The critical condition was established for linear PS (independent of MW) to separate cyclic PS (dependent on MW).
